by_target.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type === 'inventoryAction' && doc.targetId) { emit([doc.targetType || null, doc.targetId], null); } }

by_status.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type === 'inventoryAction' && doc.status) { emit([doc.status, doc.performedAt || null], null); } }

by_assignee.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type !== 'inventoryAction') { return; } var assignee = doc.assignee || (doc.details && doc.details.assignee) || doc.performedBy || null; if (assignee) { emit(assignee, null); } }

planned_for_target.map: function (doc) { if (doc.type !== 'inventoryAction' || !doc.targetId) { return; } var details = doc.details || {}; var plannedFor = doc.plannedFor || details.plannedFor || null; if (plannedFor) { emit([doc.targetType || null, doc.targetId, plannedFor], null); return; } if (doc.status === 'pending' && doc.performedAt) { emit([doc.targetType || null, doc.targetId, doc.performedAt], null); } }
